text: ACP mode: ability to send regular prompts and steering messages to the agent, AND send a queued message to the agent's CLI (queue-then-deliver to CLI). Relates to 013.005.009-T (CLI pass-through) and the operator->agent steering/session-prompt channel.

backlogit CLI v1.3.0 'shipment ship' is DESTRUCTIVE/buggy: it archived the parent epic (013-F) whose children were still active, orphaning them (013.005-F lost parent_id), and re-stamped ALL previously-archived items (013.001-004) with the wrong merge commit SHA + status archived. Until fixed, do shipment closure MANUALLY: set task/feature status to done and shipment to shipped via direct text edits (also preserves body sections that CLI move/add strip), record merge SHA on the shipment file, run doctor to verify no orphans. Investigate/report upstream backlogit bug.

ACP steering-delivery hardening (from T8.4 adversarial review): (1) P2 cross-protocol double-delivery — the ACP heartbeat steering path (deliver_pending_steering) and the MCP heartbeat tool (fetch_and_consume_steering) both fetch_unconsumed then mark_consumed with no atomic claim; while both are reachable (ACP mode still exposes the HTTP MCP endpoint pre-cutover), concurrent passes can deliver the same steering twice. Queue is already at-least-once (deliver-then-consume, F-06). Self-resolves at MCP cutover (013.005.003-T removes the MCP heartbeat tool), leaving a single serialized ACP consumer. If needed before cutover, add per-session serialization across both paths (do NOT claim-before-deliver — breaks F-06 retry). (2) P3 defensive re-register: heartbeat + reconnect-flush steering delivery call send_prompt without re-registering agent_session_id from DB (unlike store_from_slack) — if the in-memory mapping is missing after a restart-while-alive, delivery fails NotFound and stays queued. Consider mirroring store_from_slack's re-registration in deliver_pending_steering/flush.
